prompt: Put the new checkout behind a flag at 10%, then ramp it to 50%.
note: list to dedup, create the gate, then widen the rollout (ramp = update; there is no separate rollout tool)

prompt: Roll new checkout out to 50% of US users, always allow alice@acme.com and bob@acme.com, plus the internal team.
note: one gate, several gatekeeper steps: US 50% + email whitelist + team access. Args must carry country + whitelisted emails
terse ask must still geo-target India — list first to see if a payments gate exists, then create one (or enable/update the existing gate) scoped to India
read-only ask must not mutate anything

prompt: Set up a kill switch to disable the payments integration if it fails.
note: ASPIRATIONAL: after the kill switch, the agent should ask (AskUserQuestion) whether to add a failure metric + alert so we know WHEN to flip it

prompt: Turn on the new pricing page only for users in Brazil.
note: geo targeting — the agent must PULL the Country template (release_flags_templates_list) to get country in [<ISO>], then create a pricing gate scoped to BR.

prompt: Roll out the redesigned dashboard to Germany and France only.
note: multi-country geo targeting — pull the Country template first, then country in [DE, FR]. Args must carry both ISO codes.

prompt: What flag targeting templates do we have?
note: read-only ask about the template catalog must route to the templates list tool and mutate nothing

prompt: Roll out the new billing page to just our team first.
note: team-only rollout — the agent must PULL the @team template (release_flags_templates_list), which gives `email in ["@team"]`; the create args must carry the @team symbol (expands to the team's emails at rebuild).

prompt: Gradually roll out the new search experience — 5% now, then ramp to 100%.
note: gradual/staged rollout — create the gate at a low rollout_percent then widen it (ramp = release_flags_update; there is no separate rollout tool).

prompt: Set up a payments kill switch with a separate toggle to kill just the EU checkout.
note: killswitch with a named switch — the switches map ({ eu_checkout: false }) gates one call site independent of the flat value; define it on create (or release_killswitch_set the switchKey after).

prompt: Add a notifications kill switch with an independent off-switch for the SMS channel.
note: per-feature switch — the switches map ({ sms: false }) is a named override that kills the SMS channel while the flat killswitch stays as-is; set it on create.

prompt: Set up a feature flag called dedupe_checkout for the new checkout page.
note: DEDUP: dedupe_checkout is pre-created; the ask would 'create' it again. This case is OUTCOME-gated — the point is that exactly one dedupe_checkout gate survives, however the agent gets there. Listing first is the ideal path (informational).
